articles.title: This Week In Coins: Bitcoin Unmoved, But Proof-of-Work Classics Bitcoin Cash and Litecoin Moon
articles.description: Also, this week’s news surfaced doubts about BlackRock’s Bitcoin spot ETF application.

articles.title: Crypto Exchange Bittrex Fights Back Against SEC and Extends Support for XRP, ADA, DOGE on the Same Day
articles.description: Bittrex, a major cryptocurrency exchange, has chosen to contest the SEC’s complaint against it. This decision has been applauded by a popular pseudonymous legal expert known as “MetaLawMan” on Twitter. To provide some background, the SEC charged Bittrex and its co-founder and former CEO William Shihara in April 2023 for operating an unregistered national securities […]

articles.title: Ripple bulls lose all momentum amid reports of Citigroup reconsidering Metaco deal
articles.description: Ripple (XRP) bulls are struggling to regain momentum after media reports on June 30 claimed Citigroup might be reconsidering its partnership with Metaco — a company Ripple Labs recently acquired for $250 million. Bulls lose momentum Ripple’s native token XRP had been on a steady pump for almost two months. It hit a high of […]
